boats.title: 2024 Supra SA550
boats.description: 2024 Supra SA550 demo unit, meticulously maintained, with just over 200 hours. Powered by a 6.2L Raptor V8 engine delivering 510 horsepower and 580 lb-ft of torque, this boat provides effortless towing and consistent, crisp wakes for riders of all levels. Equipped with Supra's cutting-edge wake-shaping technology, including AutoWake, the Swell Surf System, and Smart Plate, you’ll enjoy perfectly sculpted waves every time, regardless of conditions. The SA550’s spacious interior seats up to 16 passengers with premium upholstery and features Supra’s Vision Control System, giving you easy access to all settings, from ballast to audio. Enjoy a top-tier sound experience with the DSD Audio System, underwater lighting for evening rides, and deep storage for gear. With just over 200 hours, this lightly-used demo is in excellent condition and offers significant savings. Don’t miss your chance to own one of the most Advanced wake boat in the market

boats.title: 2024 MasterCraft XStar S
boats.description:
THIS IS A NEW DEMO BOAT WITH 50 HRS 229,999 TAKING ALL OFFERS
 2024 MasterCraft XStar S The XStar S is the pinnacle flagship of the MasterCraft fleet. Filled with premium comforts at every touchpoint, the XStar S takes luxury and performance to the next level. With SurfStar, and even more ballast for 2024, the XStar S pumps out the world’s most versatile, clean and consistent waves. This is summer, perfected. Features may include: LUXURIOUS STYLING With the iconic pickle-fork bow, progressive styling and more than twenty-nine gelcoat and flake options, the XStar S is always a head-turner. Featuring the most customization options on the market, you can seamlessly match your unique hull design to your tower, windshield and badging to elevate your XStar S design. Dark, rich colors can also be added to the interior with our exclusive CoolFeel vinyl – which stays up to 30% cooler than traditional vinyl. PREMIUM PERFORMANCE Born from its legendary sibling, the XStar, the XStar S was built to perform. With SurfStar and an additional 200 pound ballast boost, the 2024 XStar S provides more wave amplitude, push and versatility than ever before. Paired with the available Ilmor SUPERCHARGED 6.2L engine, the XStar is the most luxurious, most powerful and highest performing boat in the world. PREMIUM AMENITIES From bow to stern, the XStar S provides ample room for lounging including the fan-favorite, patented transom chaise lounge seats with headrests and footrests. New for 2024, opt for the flip-down swimstep to make getting in and out of the water easier than ever before. Thanks to the standard dual screen dash, power helm seat and optional stern thruster, the captain’s experience has been perfected. No matter where you’re sitting, the XStar S is premium

boats.title: YAMAHA vx cruiser 1100
boats.description: This unit is in excellent condition and in great running order with only 184 hours of use on it.  Includes a trailer (that the unit is sitting on in the pictures) and a cover.  This unit has 110hp and is well powered.  Please refer to attached photos for more information.

boats.title: NEW 2024 MOOMBA CRAZ
boats.description: 2024 Moomba Craz: Traditional Styling, Amplified Performance Experience Exception Wake & Surf Performance With The 2024 Moomba Craz Embark on an unparalleled wake adventure with the 2024 Moomba Craz, a wake boat engineered to perform far beyond it's weight class. Combining traditional styling with modern performance, the Moomba Craz is perfect for all riding styles. Key Features of the Moomba Craz Innovative Wake Technology: The Moomba Craz's advanced hull design and AutoWake® system ensure the perfect wake every time. Exceptional Power & Performance: Powered by the impressive Raptor 400 6.2L Engine by Indmar, this boat offers exceptional power and reliability to ensure you have less downtime and more time to make memories on the water. Spacious & Comfortable: With enough seating space for 15 passengers, the Moomba Craz ensures comfort for both riders and spectators on the boat. User Friendly Helm: When it comes to being user friendly, this is just one of many places the Moomba line of boats excels. Whether you prefer to keep it simple and use the manual toggle switches, or let AutoWake do it’s magic and control everything though the touchscreen, the Craz is extremely simple to dial in and adjust on the fly! Premium Sound System: Moomba delivers an exceptional audio experience on their boats thanks to WetSounds. This boat is equipped with a full WetSounds stereo system, including an amplified subwoofer, amplified cabin speakers, and amplified Rev 10 HD tower speakers. Engineered for Adventure The 2024 Moomba Craz is not just any wake boat; it's a statement. With its dynamic performance and innovative wake technology, it's designed to push the boundaries of what a wake boat can do. Whether you're carving the perfect wave, throwing big air wake tricks, or cruising in style, the Moomba Craz is sure to deliver an unforgettable experience. Family Friendly Fun With its spacious layout and comfortable seating, the Moomba Craz is ideal for family outings. Enjoy the thrill of wake sports or a relaxing day on the water. The easy-to-use controls and safety features ensure a stress-free and enjoyable time for everyone on board. Ready to Make Waves? Experience the thrill of the 2024 Moomba Craz. Whether you're an avid wakeboarder or just love being on the water, the Moomba Craz is your ticket to adventure. Send us a message

boats.title: Coach 243 FLC
boats.description:
HUGE BLOW-OUT SALE MUST GO TAKING ALL OFFERS $84,999 OBO CALL 
The Coach 243 FLC is great for those who not only enjoy cruising around the lake, but also enjoy soaking up the sun while hanging out at the sandbar or anchored in a cove. The FLC line of boats feature a rear day-bed that allows for tons of space to lay out and catch some sun both while underway and while anchored. The day-bed also has 2 separate adjustable backrest to provide you with multiple seating options to best suit you and your crew. This specific Coach 243 FLC features the stone furniture package with the woven tapestry flooring. Additionally, this boat features a raised helm, below deck and above deck RGB lighting, premium steering wheel, and Bazooka bass tube. This boat is also equipped with the HP Triple Tune upgrade which provides increased stability while underway. Powering this gorgeous black boat is a 225 HP Honda. This engine is extremely powerful and makes getting around the lake far more enjoyable! What sets Coach Pontoons apart from their competitors? To kick things off, Coach Pontoons believe that high quality with exceptional durability is the only way to build a pontoon. Each pontoon features a fully welded C-Channel bow and extended swim deck along with full-length interior risers. This helps increase ride quality by eliminating unwanted flex. As for the construction of the actual pontoons, Coach also uses extruded splash fins to prevent unwanted spray along with a reinforced power keel to provide better tracking and more protection to the pontoons when being beached.

boats.title: PREMIER 230 Sunsation
boats.description: Luxury, Comfort, and Endless Fun! The Premier Sunsation Pontoon seamlessly blends exceptional performance with unparalleled luxury, ensuring every outing is an unforgettable adventure. Whether you’re cruising on tranquil waters, entertaining friends, or indulging in watersports, the Sunsation Pontoon is designed to elevate your boating experience to new heights. Elegant Design and Spacious Layout: The Sunsation’s eye-catching design and thoughtful layout maximize space and comfort. Plush seating, abundant storage, and a variety of seating configurations provide the perfect setting for relaxation and socializing. The high-quality materials and meticulous craftsmanship ensure lasting durability and aesthetic appeal. Powered By Suzuki for Top-Tier
